case_title: TERESA HOLMAN PARKER VS. JONATHAN G. CHANCE, ESQ.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY PARKER, TERESA HOLMAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHANCE, ESQ., JONATHAN G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-23-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKER, TERESA HOLMAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANCE, ESQ., JONATHAN G. $50.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $135.00, THE COURT CALCULATED THE REASONABLE VALUE OF DEFENDANT'S SERVICES TO BE $1450.00. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE IS DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-23-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-23-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $55.00) SERVED JUN-25-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHANCE, ESQ., JONATHAN G.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2010 - JUDGMENT.
